title: An ‘Unprecedented’ Outbreak of Meningitis Raises Alarm in Britain
summary_full: Two people have died in an outbreak of meningococcal disease. Many cases were traced to a nightclub in Canterbury that is popular with students at the University of Kent.
summary_public: Two people have died in an outbreak of meningococcal disease. Many cases were traced to a nightclub in Canterbury that is popular with students at the University of Kent.
